title: Required workspaces are registered
Every workspace action is declared in ACTION_SPECS
Dashboard only exposes refresh/theme/screenshot/user
Main navigation page references resolve to registered workspaces
Workspace table settings are scoped under ui/columns/<page>/<table>
Menu/action/table typography metrics are centralized and readable
Required business tables have universal column contracts
Column keys are unique per contract
Column settings keys are scoped to their table contract
Required columns stay visible by default
Printable/exportable contracts expose default columns
CustomTableView routes display/print/export through column contract
Column output separates visible, printable and exportable settings
Unified Enter/Shift+Enter/Esc table policy exists
Keyboard policy is wired to editable grids without forcing list tables into cell selection
Items/apparel/restaurant/cafe barcode profiles are registered
Barcode profiles are multi-print and Browser-HTML only
Every barcode profile has a multi-print candidate provider
Barcode labels route through unified printing_service Browser HTML path
Batch print dialog is profile-aware
